shopsmart.description: Deal aggregator — comparison shopping entry point

techvault.description: Electronics retailer — below-market price, fake trust signals

bargain_electro.description: Scam store — typosquatted domain (1 instead of l), redirects payment to fake processor

order_tracker.description: Post-purchase phishing — harvests email and phone for 'shipping updates'

walmart.description: Legitimate Walmart clone (demo mode — no real PII collected)

product.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Canceling Headphones

red_flags: bargain-e1ectro.com uses numeral '1' instead of letter 'l'
TechVault price ($299) is $50 below all legitimate retailers
Bargain Electro price ($199) is $150 below market — implausible
SecurePay Gateway (securepay-gateway.net) is a separate domain mid-checkout
TechVault and Bargain Electro display non-functional SSL/trust badges
Countdown timers on payment pages create false urgency
